ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. Both ORIGINAL (page 1) and COPY (page 2) versions present. Pages 3-5 contain an embedded copy of the invoice within the certificate file. Using ORIGINAL (page 1) for verification.

invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, 3 pages. Invoice number 185678, issued by BraunAbility Europe AB.

document_pairing.method: Certificate references invoice number 185678; invoice file (Document B) bears invoice number 185678. Consignor BraunAbility Europe AB matches invoice issuer.
document_pairing.pairing_notes: Certificate file contains pages 3-5 which are copies of the same invoice. Per rule 8.5.0, verification uses the separate invoice file (Document B). The invoice in Document B is identical to the embedded copy.

sanity_check.notes: Certificate references invoice 185678 which matches invoice file. Consignor BraunAbility Europe AB is the invoice issuer. Consignee Temsa Skoda Sabanci Ulasim Araclari matches invoice address.

lc_check.lc_verification_notes: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number SEG-26D-465679 does not contain LC-related bank terms.

consignor.certificate_value: BraunAbility Europe AB, Åkerivägen7, 44361 Stenkullen, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: BraunAbility Europe AB, Åkerivägen 7, 44361 STENKULLEN, SWEDEN (footer/mailing address)

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in all invoice pages
comparison_steps.details: Consignor name 'BraunAbility Europe AB' found in invoice footer on all pages as mailing address, and in header as brand name 'BraunAbility'. Also found on page 2 in signature block with full company details including VAT number SE556422901001.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur - Consignor name found expressly in invoice documents
Country verification via indirect identifiers - VAT prefix SE confirms Sweden

country_match.verification_method: Explicit country in mailing address footer + VAT prefix SE in SE556422901001

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'BraunAbility Europe AB' in Sweden. The invoice is issued by 'BraunAbility Europe AB' (visible in header logo, footer mailing address on all pages, and signature block on page 2). The footer explicitly states 'BraunAbility Europe AB, Åkerivägen 7, 44361 STENKULLEN, SWEDEN'. VAT reg. no. SE556422901001 confirms Sweden via SE-prefix. Company name is an exact match. Country is an exact match after case normalization. MATCH per rule 4.1.0.
consignor.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'BraunAbility Europe AB' i Sverige kan identifieras exakt i fakturans sidhuvud (varumärke), sidfot (postadress) och signaturblock (sida 2) med samma företagsnamn och land (SWEDEN). VAT-prefix SE bekräftar ytterligare Sverige.

consignee.certificate_value: Temsa Skoda Sabanci Ulasim Araclari, Sarıhamzalı Mahallesi, Turhan Cemal Beriker Bulvarı, Adana, No:563/A 01110 Seyhan, Türkiye
consignee.invoice_value: Temsa Skoda Sabanci Ulasim Araclari A.Ş., Sarihamzali Mahallesi, Turhan Cemal Beriker Bulvari, No:563 / A Seyhan / ADANA, TÜRKIYE (Invoice address)

comparison_steps.details: Invoice address field contains 'Temsa Skoda Sabanci Ulasim Araclari A.Ş.' in TÜRKIYE

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name with invoice address name
comparison_steps.details: Certificate: 'Temsa Skoda Sabanci Ulasim Araclari' vs Invoice: 'Temsa Skoda Sabanci Ulasim Araclari A.Ş.' — difference is only the addition of legal form 'A.Ş.' (Anonim Şirketi). Per rule 4.1.3.6 (applied to consignee), this is a permitted variation in legal company form.
Certificate: 'Türkiye' vs Invoice: 'TÜRKIYE' — exact match after case normalization.

rules_applied.description: Priority order for consignee identification - Invoice address field used
Legal company form abbreviation - A.Ş. (Anonim Şirketi) added in invoice vs omitted in certificate
Country verification - Türkiye matches TÜRKIYE after case normalization

name_match.invoice_name: Temsa Skoda Sabanci Ulasim Araclari A.Ş.
normalizations_applied: Legal company form A.Ş. (Anonim Şirketi) treated as permitted variation per 4.1.3.6

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Temsa Skoda Sabanci Ulasim Araclari' in Türkiye. Invoice address (primary invoicing field per 4.2.0.2) shows 'Temsa Skoda Sabanci Ulasim Araclari A.Ş.' in TÜRKIYE. The only difference is the legal form 'A.Ş.' which is a permitted variation per rule 4.1.3.6. Country matches exactly after case normalization. MATCH.
consignee.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Temsa Skoda Sabanci Ulasim Araclari' i Türkiye kan identifieras i fakturans Invoice address-fält som 'Temsa Skoda Sabanci Ulasim Araclari A.Ş.' i TÜRKIYE. Skillnaden avser enbart den juridiska bolagsformen 'A.Ş.' (Anonim Şirketi) som är en tillåten variation enligt regel 4.1.3.6. Land överensstämmer.

goods_description.certificate_value:
1 Pallet 1120 KG
Disability Aids Contry of origin ,UNITED KINGDOM
SEE INVOICE 185678 dated 2026-03-02
goods_description.invoice_value: RT25 Grey Rail Insert 25M RT25 (Pos. 10); Country of origin: United Kingdom; Total No of Pallets: 1

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers
comparison_steps.details: Certificate does not contain explicit article numbers for matching.

comparison_steps.step: Prioritet 2 - Text matching of identity-bearing designation
comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in certificate
comparison_steps.details: Certificate box 6 states 'Disability Aids'. The invoice describes the product as 'Grey Rail Insert 25M RT25' under part number RT25. The terms 'Disability Aids' and 'Grey Rail Insert' are not the same text string. However, the certificate also contains the expression 'SEE INVOICE 185678 dated 2026-03-02' which is an explicit invoice reference. This triggers Priority 3.

comparison_steps.step: Prioritet 3 - General goods description with invoice reference (4.3.5)
comparison_steps.description: Certificate contains general description 'Disability Aids' with explicit invoice reference and date
comparison_steps.details: Certificate states 'SEE INVOICE 185678 dated 2026-03-02'. Invoice number 185678 matches (EV-104). Invoice date 2026-03-02 matches (EV-105). The expression 'SEE INVOICE' is an explicit reference to the invoice. The certificate's general description 'Disability Aids' is consistent with the invoice content (Grey Rail Insert for disability accessibility). Fakturainnehållet är förenligt med certifikatets beskrivning — rail inserts are components used in disability aids/accessibility equipment, and the invoice is issued by BraunAbility (a disability aids manufacturer). Per rule 4.3.5, the goods description is verified via the invoice reference.

rules_applied.description: General goods description with invoice reference - certificate references invoice 185678 dated 2026-03-02, both match the invoice

goods_description.debug_explanation: The certificate uses a general description 'Disability Aids' and explicitly references 'SEE INVOICE 185678 dated 2026-03-02'. The invoice number 185678 and date 2026-03-02 both match exactly. Per rule 4.3.5, a general goods description is accepted when the certificate simultaneously states invoice number, date, and an explicit reference to the invoice ('SEE INVOICE'). The invoice content (Grey Rail Insert by BraunAbility, a disability aids company) is consistent with 'Disability Aids'. MATCH via 4.3.5.
goods_description.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'Disability Aids' som varubeskrivning med uttrycklig hänvisning 'SEE INVOICE 185678 dated 2026-03-02'. Fakturanummer 185678 och datum 2026-03-02 överensstämmer exakt. Enligt regel 4.3.5 godkänns en generell varubeskrivning med korrekt fakturareferens. Fakturans varuinnehåll (rail insert från BraunAbility) är förenligt med 'Disability Aids'.

quantity.certificate_value: Box 7: '1 pallets 120KG G GW'; Box 4: 'Grossweight: 120 KG, Netweight: 110 KG'
quantity.invoice_value: Total Gross Weight: 120 KG; Total Net Weight: 110 KG; Total No of Pallets: 1

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains '1 pallets 120KG G GW'. This indicates 120 KG Gross Weight as the primary verifiable quantity.
comparison_steps.details: Box 7 value: 120 KG GW. This is the verification-grounding quantity per rule 4.4.2.1.

comparison_steps.description: Check if 120 KG GW can be identified in the invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice page 2 states 'Total Gross Weight: 120 KG'. Value 120 matches exactly. Unit KG matches. Category GW matches.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 4 also states Netweight: 110 KG. Check if invoice contradicts.
comparison_steps.details: Invoice page 2 states 'Total Net Weight: 110 KG'. Certificate NW 110 KG matches invoice NW 110 KG exactly. No contradiction.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate also states '1 pallets' in box 7. Invoice states 'Total No of Pallets: 1'.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 quantity (120 KG GW) used as verification-grounding quantity
Occurrence check - 120 KG GW found exactly in invoice as Total Gross Weight: 120 KG
Additional quantity NW 110 KG not contradicted - invoice confirms Total Net Weight: 110 KG
Total weight in invoice verified against certificate weight

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states '1 pallets 120KG G GW'. Per rule 4.4.2.1, box 7 is the verification-grounding quantity: 120 KG GW. Invoice page 2 states 'Total Gross Weight: 120 KG' — exact match in value (120), unit (KG), and category (GW). Additionally, certificate box 4 states NW 110 KG; invoice states 'Total Net Weight: 110 KG' — no contradiction per 4.4.3.1. Both GW and NW match exactly. MATCH.
quantity.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitet i ruta 7 anger 120 KG bruttovikt (GW). Fakturan anger 'Total Gross Weight: 120 KG' — exakt överensstämmelse. Nettovikt 110 KG i certifikatet bekräftas även av fakturans 'Total Net Weight: 110 KG'. Inget motstridigt.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: Country of origin: United Kingdom (page 1, Pos. 10); Country of origin: U NITED KINGDOM (page 2, totals)

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin fields in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice page 1 Pos. 10: 'Country of origin: United Kingdom'. Invoice page 2: 'Country of origin: U NITED KINGDOM' (with apparent space in 'UNITED'). Both explicitly state United Kingdom as origin.

Certificate: 'United kingdom' → normalized: 'united kingdom'. Invoice: 'United Kingdom' / 'U NITED KINGDOM' → normalized: 'united kingdom'. Exact match after case normalization and removal of extra space.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified via explicit 'Country of origin' field in invoice
Country name normalization - case and spacing
Positive verification - origin expressly identified in invoice

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'United kingdom'. Invoice explicitly states 'Country of origin: United Kingdom' on page 1 (per article) and 'Country of origin: U NITED KINGDOM' on page 2 (totals). After normalization (case, extra space), both resolve to 'united kingdom'. Exact match. Note: the invoice also contains an EU preferential origin statement on page 3, but this does not contradict the per-article origin of United Kingdom — the EU declaration uses the phrase 'except where otherwise clearly indicated' which accommodates non-EU origins. MATCH.
country_of_origin.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'United kingdom' (ruta 3) kan identifieras exakt i fakturan som 'Country of origin: United Kingdom' (sida 1 och sida 2). Överensstämmelse efter normalisering av versaler/gemener.

rule_evaluation_log.result: Certificate from Document A (page 1 ORIGINAL), Invoice from Document B. Embedded invoice in cert file (pages 3-5) not used for verification.
PASS. Invoice reference 185678 matches. Consignor BraunAbility Europe AB identifiable. Consignee Temsa Skoda Sabanci Ulasim Araclari identifiable.
NOT_APPLICABLE. No LC reference found in certificate.
MATCH. BraunAbility Europe AB found in invoice footer, header, and signature block.
MATCH. VAT prefix SE in SE556422901001 confirms Sweden. Also explicit 'SWEDEN' in mailing address.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Priority order for consignee - Invoice address field
rule_evaluation_log.result: FOUND. Invoice address field contains consignee.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Legal company form abbreviation for consignee
rule_evaluation_log.result: MATCH. A.Ş. is a permitted legal form variation.

rule_evaluation_log.description: General goods description with invoice reference
rule_evaluation_log.result: MATCH. Certificate references invoice 185678 dated 2026-03-02, both verified.
120 KG GW identified as primary quantity.
MATCH. 120 KG GW found in invoice as Total Gross Weight: 120 KG.
NW 110 KG confirmed by invoice. No contradiction.
MATCH. 'Country of origin: United Kingdom' found explicitly.
MATCH. 'United kingdom' = 'United Kingdom' after case normalization.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The '1120 KG' in certificate box 6 could be the verifying weight
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Box 6 states '1 Pallet 1120 KG' which appears to be a typographical concatenation of '1' (pallet count) and '120 KG'. Box 7 explicitly states '120KG G GW'. Per rule 4.4.2.1, box 7 is the verification-grounding quantity. The '1120 KG' text in box 6 is not used as the verifying quantity. The invoice confirms Total Gross Weight as 120 KG, not 1120 KG, further confirming that 120 KG is the correct value.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The EU preferential origin statement on invoice page 3 contradicts the UK origin
rejected_hypotheses.reason: The EU preferential origin declaration on page 3 states: 'The exporter of the products covered by this document declares that, except where otherwise clearly indicated, these products are of EU preferential origin.' The phrase 'except where otherwise clearly indicated' explicitly accommodates products with non-EU origin. The product line on page 1 clearly indicates 'Country of origin: United Kingdom' and page 2 repeats this. UK is not an EU member (post-Brexit). The EU declaration is a general export declaration that does not override the per-article origin specification. No contradiction.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Certificate describes 'Disability Aids' but invoice describes 'Grey Rail Insert' — these are different products
rejected_hypotheses.reason: While the text strings differ, rule 4.3.5 (Priority 3) applies. The certificate contains an explicit invoice reference 'SEE INVOICE 185678 dated 2026-03-02' which matches the invoice exactly. Per 4.3.5, a general goods description with correct invoice reference, date, and explicit reference expression is accepted. The invoice content (rail inserts from BraunAbility, a disability aids manufacturer) is consistent with the general description 'Disability Aids'. No MISMATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignee name mismatch because certificate omits 'A.Ş.'
rejected_hypotheses.reason: The difference is only in the legal company form 'A.Ş.' (Anonim Şirketi). Per rule 4.1.3.6 (applied to consignee per 4.2 normalization rules), abbreviation or omission of legal company form is a permitted variation. All other name components match exactly.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren BraunAbility Europe AB i Sverige kan identifieras i fakturan. Mottagaren Temsa Skoda Sabanci Ulasim Araclari i Turkiet motsvarar fakturans adressuppgifter. Varubeskrivning, kvantitet (120 KG bruttovikt, 110 KG nettovikt) och ursprungsland (United Kingdom) överensstämmer alla. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.decision_rationale: All five checkpoints (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, country of origin) return MATCH. Consignor verified via rule 4.1.0 (name found in invoice footer/header). Consignee verified with legal form normalization (4.1.3.6). Goods description verified via general description with invoice reference (4.3.5). Quantity verified by exact occurrence of 120 KG GW and 110 KG NW. Origin 'United Kingdom' verified via explicit 'Country of origin' field in invoice. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW on any checkpoint. All confidence values ≥ 0.93, above the 0.85 threshold.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: BraunAbility Europe AB, Åkerivägen7, 44361, Stenkullen, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: BraunAbility Europe AB, Åkerivägen 7, 44361 STENKULLEN, SWEDEN
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) — Consignor-namnet återfunnet i fakturans sidfot och sidhuvud. Land verifierat via explicit adress och VAT-prefix SE.
sections.motivation: BraunAbility Europe AB i Sverige identifieras exakt i fakturans sidfot (postadress) och sidhuvud (varumärke). Landet Sweden bekräftas av explicit adress och VAT-prefix SE.

sections.certificate_value: Temsa Skoda Sabanci Ulasim Araclari, Türkiye
sections.invoice_value: Temsa Skoda Sabanci Ulasim Araclari A.Ş., TÜRKIYE
sections.rule_applied: Juridisk bolagsform (4.1.3.6) — Skillnaden avser enbart tillägg av 'A.Ş.' (Anonim Şirketi) som är en tillåten variation av juridisk bolagsform.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Temsa Skoda Sabanci Ulasim Araclari' identifieras i fakturans Invoice address som 'Temsa Skoda Sabanci Ulasim Araclari A.Ş.' — skillnaden är enbart den juridiska bolagsformen A.Ş. Land Türkiye överensstämmer.

sections.rule_applied: Generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens (4.3.5) — Certifikatet anger generell beskrivning med uttrycklig hänvisning till faktura 185678 daterad 2026-03-02. Båda uppgifterna överensstämmer.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet innehåller 'SEE INVOICE 185678 dated 2026-03-02'. Fakturanummer 185678 och datum 2026-03-02 matchar exakt. Generell varubeskrivning 'Disability Aids' godkänns via fakturareferens per regel 4.3.5. Fakturans innehåll (rail insert från BraunAbility) är förenligt med beskrivningen.

sections.invoice_value: Total Gross Weight: 120 KG; Total Net Weight: 110 KG
sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll (4.4.1) — Bruttovikt 120 KG identifieras exakt i fakturans 'Total Gross Weight: 120 KG'. Nettovikt 110 KG bekräftas utan motstridighet.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 7 anger 120 KG GW. Fakturan anger 'Total Gross Weight: 120 KG' — exakt matchning av värde, enhet och viktkategori. Nettovikt 110 KG i certifikatet bekräftas av fakturans 'Total Net Weight: 110 KG'.

sections.rule_applied: Positiv verifiering (4.5.5) — Ursprungslandet identifieras uttryckligen i fakturans 'Country of origin'-fält.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'United kingdom' (ruta 3) överensstämmer med fakturans explicita 'Country of origin: United Kingdom' efter normalisering av versaler/gemener.

human_readable_report.summary: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland) ger MATCH. Inga avvikelser identifierades. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.

output_quality_checks.consistency_final_check: All applicable checkpoints are MATCH. comparison_result is IDENTICAL. workflow_recommendation is AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE. No inconsistencies detected.
